children.heading: Agricultural research facility
children.label: 1 Agricultural research facility
children.text: The term “agricultural research facility” means a proposed facility for research in food and agricultural sciences for which Federal funds are requested by an entity eligible to receive funds under a capacity and infrastructure program (as defined in ) to assist in the construction, alteration, acquisition, modernization, renovation, or remodeling of the facility.section 6971(f)(1)(C) of this title

children.heading: Congressional agriculture committees
children.label: 2 Congressional agriculture committees
children.text: The term “congressional agriculture committees” means the Committee on Appropriations and the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Appropriations and the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate.

children.heading: Food and agricultural sciences
children.label: 3 Food and agricultural sciences
children.text: The term “food and agricultural sciences” has the meaning given that term in .section 3103 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.
